name: @prune/anti-synergy
description: G1/G2/G3 anti-synergy guardrails — deterministic gates that stop one optimization from sabotaging another. G1 pruner-vs-cache-bust: don't prune a result that anchors a cache/delta baseline when busting it costs more than the prune saves. G2 skip-retrieval-starves-skill-capture: don't skip a retrieval step the skill-library is mid-capture on. G3 re-squeeze-prefix-bust: don't re-compress content already anchored in the cached prefix. Pure set/arithmetic predicates over caller-supplied facts; no regex, no model.
